channel.title: Digital Campus - Release Notes
channel.description: Technology products managed by the Digital Campus team

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.9.0
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Amazon Signage Stick (ASS) dedicated player. Previously ran Amazon Fire OS player on ASS device.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.7.16
item.description:
ScreenCloud

Rollback release fixing issues introduced in v4.7.12. Released at 50% for Fire OS players alongside v4.6.30.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.11.2
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Support for Amazon’s Remote Device Management (RDM) for Signage Sticks, including:Screen/TV mute and unmute via HDMI-CECScreen/TV power on and off via HDMI-CECDevice rebootScreenshot and full-screen captureDeep cache clearing (player app and Android system cache)Player app restartCPU and GPU...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Updates Weekly Recap - May 29, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Introducing a fresh visual identity for Google Workspace app iconsWe’re updating icons across Google Workspace to introduce a modern visual design that gives every app a more distinct identity. Over the next several weeks, users will see new icons for Gmail, Calendar, Chat, Meet, Drive, Docs,...

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - May 29, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Keep track of student progress with learning standards and skills in Google Classroom
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Classroom now allows educators to tag coursework and rubrics with learning goals, including specific learning standards and skills, providing a more structured way to monitor student growth. When creating assignments, quiz assignments, questions, or materials, educators can search for...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new builds for 29 May 2026
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, This week we continue to expand the rollout of the new Windows Insider Program changes to devices in channels already announced. New builds this week Today we are releasing new Windows 11 Insider Preview B The post Announcing new builds for 29 May 2026 appeared first on...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Available in beta: Convert your client-side encrypted Slides after a Vault or Takeout export
item.description:
Google Workspace

Admins can now bulk export client-side encrypted (CSE) Slides using Vault or Data Export (takeout), and then convert those exports into PowerPoint files. This allows your organization to retain complete ownership, access, and control of sensitive data in a highly portable format.Eligible Google...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Chat external interoperability with Microsoft Teams via NextPlane OpenHub is now available
item.description:
Google Workspace

Organizations often need to collaborate with customers, partners, and suppliers who use Microsoft Teams. NextPlane OpenHub was built to bridge this Google Chat and Microsoft Teams divide, and it is now launching external interoperability to allow communication across organizational boundaries....

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Share chats, canvases, and generated media from the Gemini app securely via Google Drive
item.description:
Google Workspace

We are introducing the ability for Workspace users on the web to share snapshots of their chats, canvases, and generated media in the Gemini app. Because this feature is powered by the same underlying technology as Google Drive, it uses the familiar, consistent sharing interface you already rely on...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Prevent account takeovers with Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC), now generally available in the Chrome browser for Windows
item.description:
Google Workspace

Previously available in beta, Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC) in the Chrome browser on Windows is now generally available and enabled by default for Google Workspace users.DBSC strengthens account security after users are logged in and helps bind a session cookie — small files used by...

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The preview Get design pages API now returns a page_number property on each page, which is a replacement for the now-deprecated index property. The tw
item.description:
Canva

The preview Get design pages API now returns a page_number property on each page, which is a replacement for the now-deprecated index property. The two properties always return the same value. The index property will be removed in a future release after existing integrations have migrated; new...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 2.5.10
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: bug-fix, sdk-version | Added AI-friendly docs and Broadcast Streaming support. Fixed `enableMicOriginalInput`.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Ask Gemini in Google Meet is becoming more easily accessible on web
item.description:
Google Workspace

In September 2025, we launched Ask Gemini in Meet, which brings the power of Gemini into your organization’s meetings. Today, we’re excited to announce that we’re making the feature more easily accessible by moving the Ask Gemini prompt box into the bottom left-hand corner of the Google Meet web...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Easily identify data irregularities with anomaly detection in Connected Sheets
item.description:
Google Workspace

You can now easily identify critical irregularities and outliers in your time-series data when using Connected Sheets to analyze BigQuery data sets from Google Sheets. Anomaly detection in Connected Sheets allows users to distinguish between expected trends and true outliers without requiring...

View release notes →

item.title: Scribe - Capture context in your language, now in 5 additional languages
item.description:
Scribe
View release notes →

item.title: Scribe - Pro Enterprise Capturing
item.description:
Scribe
View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - More granular admin controls for Workspace Studio steps and starters
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re introducing more granular admin controls for Workspace Studio steps and starters. With these new controls, admins can define which steps and starters people in their organization can use to create flows, including by Workspace service or individually. They provide admins more granular control...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Gemini LTI Update: Include your LMS sources when using NotebookLM in Powerschool Schoology
item.description:
Google Workspace

When creating a notebook in Powerschool Schoology, Gemini LTI users can now add content directly from their course as sources. This integration allows educators and students to seamlessly bridge their course materials with AI-powered research and analysis, and generate Studio artifacts like Audio...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Keep your sources up to date with automatic Drive syncing in NotebookLM
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re making it easier to keep your sources and insights current in NotebookLM by enabling automatic syncing with Google Drive. Previously, if you uploaded a file in Google Docs, Sheets, or Slides, you’d have to manually update it in NotebookLM to see the changes. With this update, as the content...

View release notes →

item.title: macOS - macOS 26.6 beta (25G5028f)
item.description:
macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Improvements to Out-of-Domain file-level warnings
item.description:
Google Workspace

Today, we’re announcing improvements to our Out-of-Domain file-level warnings. First launched in April 2025, these badges alert users to documents and users outside of their Workspace organization, helping to prevent accidental data exfiltration and potential phishing attacks that spoof internal...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Simplify decision-making with Polly, now available for Google Chat
item.description:
Google Workspace

Making decisions in a fast-paced environment often leads to long, messy threads and lost consensus. Polly helps teams solve this by enabling the creation of interactive polls within existing Chat conversations. By keeping the feedback loop inside the "flow of work," Polly helps eliminate the...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Introducing a fresh visual identity for Google Workspace app icons
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re updating icons across Google Workspace to introduce a modern visual design that gives every app a more distinct identity. Over the next several weeks, users will see new icons for Gmail, Calendar, Chat, Meet, Drive, Docs, Slides, Sheets, Vids, Keep, Forms, Voice, Sites, and Tasks.These...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Phone API endpoint deprecations
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: breaking-change, deprecation | Zoom deprecated several endpoints for phone numbers, plans, cloud peering, SMS campaigns, and related settings. Use the new Number Management APIs for enhanced, streamlined management. Migrate by June 30, 2026. We will not support deprecated endpoints after this...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Added new Dashboard APIs.
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new Dashboard API endpoints for AIC return on investment (ROI) data.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New Clip duplication API and thumbnail support
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added a new API to duplicate clips and enhanced clip updates with support for specifying a thumbnail file ID.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 5.5.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Added support for real-time audio translation to video; changed default C++ language version.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 5.5.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Added support for real-time audio translation in video; changed default C++ language version; dropped x86_64 support in simulator builds.

View release notes →

Tags: api-release | Added APIs to list and delete summarizer jobs.

item.title: Canva - New preview APIs are available: Create design merge job and Get design merge job. These APIs let you merge design pages by inserting, moving, or delet
item.description:
Canva

New preview APIs are available: Create design merge job and Get design merge job. These APIs let you merge design pages by inserting, moving, or deleting pages to create a new design or modify an existing one.

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design API now supports two new creation modes: copying an existing design using type: design, and creating a design from a brand template
item.description:
Canva

The Create design API now supports two new creation modes: copying an existing design using type: design, and creating a design from a brand template using type: brand_template. Both creation modes are currently a preview feature.

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - Streamlined UI Updates Are Now Live
item.description:
Kuali Build

Our new user interface updates are now live - see the original announcement for a detailed overview of what’s changed. These improvements a...

View release notes →

item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Updates Weekly Recap - May 15, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Whiteboarding add-ons now available for Android-based Google Meet hardwareThird-party whiteboarding add-ons for Google Meet, including Figma, Lucidspark, and Miro, will be available for room hardware based on Android. | Learn more about whiteboarding add-ons for Android-based Google Meet...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Android-based all-in-one room devices from Neat and Logitech certified for Google Meet
item.description:
Google Workspace

The Neat Board series (32, 50, and Pro) and the Logitech Rally Board 65 are now certified for Google Meet as the first Android-based all-in-one devices. They package up and deliver a modern Meet experience in stylish form factors ideal for simple deployment in traditional meeting rooms, open...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Whiteboarding add-ons now available for Android-based Google Meet hardware
item.description:
Google Workspace

Third-party whiteboarding add-ons for Google Meet will be available for room hardware based on Android. As all-in-one devices with touchscreens become certified for Meet, users will be able to whiteboard on them to share ideas, brainstorm, and work on projects together in real-time meetings,...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - New: Secondary Workflows
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now create and run Secondary Workflows to support processes that happen outside your main submission workflow. This gives you more f...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Expanding language support for refining messages with Gemini in Google Chat
item.description:
Google Workspace

We are expanding the capabilities of Gemini in Google Chat by adding support for several new languages when refining message drafts. In addition to English, users can now use Gemini to polish their messages in French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, and Spanish. This update allows a...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing new Release Preview builds for 14 May 2026
item.description:
Windows

[19 May 2026: Updated build numbers for new releases containing bug fixes - see release notes for details] Hello Windows Insiders, Today we're releasing new builds for Release Preview across our supported versions of Windows 11. Please see the bu The post Announcing new Release Preview builds for...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Expanded options for header images in Google Forms
item.description:
Google Workspace

Form creators now have more options for header images in Google Forms. Previously, creators could only use a pre-selected theme, upload an image, or choose an image from Google Photos. In addition to these options, they can now choose an image from Google Drive or Google Images or use a URL. This...

View release notes →

Google Drive Automations, Granular Capacity in Workload View, and Smoother Teammate Onboarding!This week's release automates work between ClickUp and Google Drive, provides more detail into team capacity in Workload view, and lets you onboard invitees to teams faster.✨ Automate Workflows between...

item.title: NinjaOne - Gain Better IT Asset Control and Visibility into Software Licensing With NinjaOne 13.0
item.description:
NinjaOne

NinjaOne’s 13.0 release advances IT asset management (ITAM) capabilities with software license improvements that offer greater cost visibility, usage history for custom licenses, and refined control over permissions and assignments. The platform now includes robust Lost Mode support for managed...

item.title: Canva - A new type request parameter has been added to the Create design API. Although this type is shown as required, for backward compatibility, if it isn't
item.description:
Canva

A new type request parameter has been added to the Create design API. Although this type is shown as required, for backward compatibility, if it isn't provided in a request, the request type will be assumed to be type_and_asset.

View release notes →

item.description:
ClickUp

Update Task Types in Views, Pin AI Notetaker, and more! This week’s release unlocks the ability to manage Task Types in Views, add date ranges to Gantt view exports, and so much more. Update Task Type Column in Your Views: Quickly see and update task types directly from your List and Table views....

item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - Enhanced Proof of Play (POP) with **Hourly Reporting**, giving all customers more granular visibility into content performance throughout the day. - Improved Proof of Play to ensure reporting data...

item.title: ClickUp - Super Agents: Release Notes Takeover
item.description:
ClickUp

Super Agents: The world's first human-like AI AgentsSuper Agents™ are personalized AI teammates that understand your work, use powerful tools, and collaborate like humans. Just describe the problem you want solved, the workflow you want to automate, or where you’re wasting time, and Super Agents...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - ⚡ Join us for a Super Agents AMA on Reddit!
item.description:
ClickUp

Hey, everyone!We’re excited to announce a special Reddit AMA (Ask Me Anything) with the ClickUp AI Team, all about our latest feature: Super Agents!🗓️ When: Thursday, January 22nd, 10am–12pm PST📍 Where: the r/ClickUp subreddit on RedditThis is your opportunity to connect directly with Michael Van...

View release notes →

item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to over the break and last week week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - **Secrets API: Credential Management** — IT Admins can now securely manage the lifecycle of API credentials using a centralized Secrets API. This includes creating, listing,...

View release notes →

item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🐞 Squashed Bugs - Fixed an issue where YouTube element showed an error due to recent changes in YouTube's Terms of Service. - Resolved a styling inheritance issue in Korbyt Create AI Layouts where elements did not...

View release notes →

Here's what we were up to this week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - Added audio volume control for media in Korbyt Anywhere PWA, requested specifically to be used for Microsoft Teams Rooms use cases 🐞 Squashed Bugs - Fixed display issues in the NWS Weather Element...
